imagePullSecrets.description: Global Docker registry secret names as an array

defaultStorageClass.description: Global default StorageClass for Persistent Volume(s)

adaptSecurityContext.description: Adapt the securityContext sections of the deployment to make them compatible with Openshift restricted-v2 SCC

omitEmptySeLinuxOptions.description: If set to true, removes the seLinuxOptions from the securityContexts when it is set to an empty object

apiVersions.description: Override Kubernetes API versions reported by .Capabilities

commonLabels.description: Labels to add to all deployed objects

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to all deployed objects

extraDeploy.description: Array of extra objects to deploy with the release

enabled.description: Enable diagnostic mode (all probes disabled, command overridden)

command.description: Command to override all containers in the chart release

args.description: Args to override all containers in the chart release

digest.description: headscale image digest in the way sha256:aa.... Please note this parameter, if set, will override the tag

replicaCount.description: Number of headscale replicas to deploy

extraContainerPorts.description: Optionally specify extra list of additional ports for headscale containers

customLivenessProbe.description: Custom livenessProbe that overrides the default one

customReadinessProbe.description: Custom readinessProbe that overrides the default one

customStartupProbe.description: Custom startupProbe that overrides the default one

resourcesPreset.description: Set headscale container resources according to one common preset (allowed values: none, nano, micro, small, medium, large, xlarge, 2xlarge). This is ignored if headscale.resources is set (headscale.resources is recommended for production).

resources.description: Set headscale container requests and limits for different resources like CPU or memory (essential for production workloads)

fsGroupChangePolicy.description: Set filesystem group change policy for headscale pods

sysctls.description: Set kernel settings using the sysctl interface for headscale pods

supplementalGroups.description: Set filesystem extra groups for headscale pods

fsGroup.description: Set fsGroup in headscale pods' Security Context

runAsUser.description: Set runAsUser in headscale container' Security Context

runAsGroup.description: Set runAsGroup in headscale container' Security Context

runAsNonRoot.description: Set runAsNonRoot in headscale container' Security Context

readOnlyRootFilesystem.description: Set readOnlyRootFilesystem in headscale container' Security Context

privileged.description: Set privileged in headscale container' Security Context

allowPrivilegeEscalation.description: Set allowPrivilegeEscalation in headscale container' Security Context

drop.description: List of capabilities to be dropped in headscale container

type.description: Set seccomp profile in headscale container

serverUrl.description: Public URL for the headscale server (required)

metricsListenAddr.description: Address headscale listens on for Prometheus metrics

grpcListenAddr.description: Address headscale listens on for gRPC

path.description: Path to the ACL policy file (used when mode is 'file')
Path to the SQLite database file

privateKeyPath.description: Path to the Noise protocol private key

regionId.description: DERP region ID for the embedded server

regionCode.description: DERP region code for the embedded server

regionName.description: DERP region name for the embedded server

stunListenAddr.description: STUN listen address for the embedded DERP server

privateKeyPath.description: Path to the DERP server private key

automaticallyAddEmbeddedDerpRegion.description: Automatically add the embedded DERP region to the DERP map

ipv4.description: IPv4 address of the embedded DERP server (required if enabled)

ipv6.description: IPv6 address of the embedded DERP server

paths.description: List of local DERP map files

updateFrequency.description: Frequency to check for DERP map updates

level.description: Log level (trace, debug, info, warn, error)

clientSecret.description: OIDC client secret (stored in a managed Secret). Ignored if existingSecret is set.

existingSecret.description: Name of an existing secret containing the OIDC client secret

existingSecretKey.description: Key in the existing secret containing the OIDC client secret

existingConfigmap.description: Name of an existing ConfigMap with the headscale config. If set, the managed configmap.yaml is skipped.

command.description: Override default headscale container command (useful when using custom images)

args.description: Override default headscale container args (useful when using custom images)

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Mount Service Account token in headscale pods

podAffinityPreset.description: Pod affinity preset. Ignored if `headscale.affinity` is set. Allowed values: `soft` or `hard`

podAntiAffinityPreset.description: Pod anti-affinity preset. Ignored if `headscale.affinity` is set. Allowed values: `soft` or `hard`

type.description: Node affinity preset type. Ignored if `headscale.affinity` is set. Allowed values: `soft` or `hard`

key.description: Node label key to match. Ignored if `headscale.affinity` is set

values.description: Node label values to match. Ignored if `headscale.affinity` is set

nodeSelector.description: Node labels for headscale pods assignment

podManagementPolicy.description: Pod management policy for headscale statefulset

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology Spread Constraints for headscale pod assignment

schedulerName.description: Name of the k8s scheduler (other than default) for headscale pods

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Seconds headscale pods need to terminate gracefully

lifecycleHooks.description: for headscale containers to automate configuration before or after startup

extraEnvVars.description: Array with extra environment variables to add to headscale containers

extraEnvVarsCM.description: Name of existing ConfigMap containing extra env vars for headscale containers

extraEnvVarsSecret.description: Name of existing Secret containing extra env vars for headscale containers

extraVolumes.description: Optionally specify extra list of additional volumes for the headscale pods

extraVolumeMounts.description: Optionally specify extra list of additional volumeMounts for the headscale containers

sidecars.description: Add additional sidecar containers to the headscale pods

initContainers.description: Add additional init containers to the headscale pods

create.description: Enable/disable a Pod Disruption Budget creation

minAvailable.description: Minimum number/percentage of pods that should remain scheduled

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number/percentage of pods that may be made unavailable. Defaults to `1` if both `headscale.pdb.minAvailable` and `headscale.pdb.maxUnavailable` are empty.

controlledResources.description: VPA List of resources that the vertical pod autoscaler can control

maxAllowed.description: VPA Max allowed resources for the pod

minAllowed.description: VPA Min allowed resources for the pod

annotations.description: Additional custom annotations for headscale service

extraPorts.description: Extra ports to expose in headscale service (normally used with the `sidecars` value)

sessionAffinity.description: Control where client requests go, to the same pod or round-robin

enabled.description: Specifies whether a NetworkPolicy should be created

allowExternal.description: Don't require server label for connections

allowExternalEgress.description: Allow the pod to access any range of port and all destinations.

addExternalClientAccess.description: Allow access from pods with client label set to "true". Ignored if `networkPolicy.allowExternal` is true.

extraIngress.description: Add extra ingress rules to the NetworkPolicy

extraEgress.description: Add extra egress rules to the NetworkPolicy (ignored if allowExternalEgress=true)

enabled.description: Enable ingress record generation for headscale

apiVersion.description: Force Ingress API version (automatically detected if not set)

hostname.description: Default host for the ingress record

ingressClassName.description: IngressClass that will be be used to implement the Ingress (Kubernetes 1.18+)

path.description: Default path for the ingress record

annotations.description: Additional annotations for the Ingress resource

tls.description: Enable TLS configuration for the host defined at `ingress.hostname` parameter

selfSigned.description: Create a TLS secret for this ingress record using self-signed certificates generated by Helm

extraHosts.description: An array with additional hostname(s) to be covered with the ingress record

extraPaths.description: An array with additional arbitrary paths that may need to be added to the ingress under the main host

extraTls.description: TLS configuration for additional hostname(s) to be covered with this ingress record

extraRules.description: Additional rules to be covered with this ingress record

enabled.description: Enable persistence using Persistent Volume Claims

mountPath.description: Path to mount the volume at (headscale data directory)

subPath.description: The subdirectory of the volume to mount to

existingClaim.description: The name of an existing PVC to use for persistence

selector.description: Selector to match an existing Persistent Volume for headscale data PVC

enabled.description: Enable init container that adapts the owner/group of the PV mount point(s)

digest.description: OS Shell image digest in the way sha256:aa.... Please note this parameter, if set, will override the tag

seLinuxOptions.description: Set SELinux options in init container

runAsUser.description: Set runAsUser in init container Security Context

privileged.description: Set privileged in init container Security Context

allowPrivilegeEscalation.description: Set allowPrivilegeEscalation in init container Security Context

add.description: List of capabilities to add in init container

drop.description: List of capabilities to drop in init container

type.description: Set seccomp profile in init container

resourcesPreset.description: Set init container resources according to one of the preset

resources.description: Set init container requests and limits for different resources like CPU or memory

create.description: Specifies whether RBAC resources should be created
Specifies whether a ServiceAccount should be created

name.description: The name of the ServiceAccount to use.

annotations.description: Additional Service Account annotations (evaluated as a template)

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Automount service account token for the server service account

enabled.description: Enable the export of Prometheus metrics
if `true`, creates a Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor (also requires `metrics.enabled` to be `true`)

namespace.description: Namespace in which Prometheus is running

annotations.description: Additional custom annotations for the ServiceMonitor

jobLabel.description: The name of the label on the target service to use as the job name in Prometheus

honorLabels.description: honorLabels chooses the metric's labels on collisions with target labels

interval.description: Interval at which metrics should be scraped.

scrapeTimeout.description: Timeout after which the scrape is ended
